hero.type: text-only (unauth onboarding) — full content surface gated behind login; authenticated surface presumed video-poster grid (industry-standard OTT pattern, not inspected in this pass)

cta.secondary_style: ghost / text-link in nav, no outlined variant observed in onboarding surface
cta.color_role: single brand red across all CTA variants — no secondary CTA color in unauth surface

nav.structure: minimal top bar (logo + 시작하기 CTA) on unauth onboarding; authenticated surface presumed to have GNB with --gnb-height: 70px (per CSS token)

category_taxonomy_signal.note: Six-category content taxonomy is encoded directly as CSS custom properties (--color-cate-*) on :root — meaning category color is a first-class design system primitive, not a per-page override. Live/sports surfaces have additional geometry tokens (--kbo-player-*, --sports-player-*) suggesting dedicated layouts for KBO baseball and other live sports content.

notes: Unauthenticated visitors are redirected from / to /onboarding — full catalog browse is gated.
Pretendard exclusive: zero non-Pretendard sample observed.
Dark canvas is locked at html level (#000) — no theme-switch token observed.

Card radius pattern is top-corners-only (poster image bleeds to bottom edge), a streaming-platform idiom shared with Disney+ / Netflix / Wavve but distinct in TVING's 16.5292px radius (≈ 1rem * 1.033).
Live-streaming geometry primitives (--live-tab-player-*, --kbo-player-*, --sports-player-*) are first-class design tokens — TVING treats live as a separate surface paradigm from VOD.
Bottom tab present at 4.167rem (≈ 66.7px) per design token — mobile-first chrome.

Emotion CSS-in-JS (`css-*` class hashes) + Tailwind utilities (`--tw-*` token namespace) coexist; semantic shadcn-pattern role vars (`--card`, `--popover`, `--muted`, `--accent`) suggest a shadcn/ui base with Pretendard + brand red overlay.
